user.title: Set up Schellenberg USB Stick
user.description: Enter the serial port path for your Schellenberg USB stick.

usb_confirm.title: Confirm Schellenberg USB Stick
usb_confirm.description: Confirm the serial port path for your discovered Schellenberg USB stick.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the serial port
error.pairing_timeout: No device responded within 2 minutes. Please try again and ensure you press the pairing button on your blind motor.

abort.no_hub: No USB hub found. Please set up the USB hub first.

user.title: Pair a new device
user.description: Press the pair button to activate pairing mode on your Schellenberg USB stick. Then press the pairing button on your blind motor within 2 minutes.

name_device.title: Name your device
name_device.description:
Pairing successful! Device ID: {device_id}

Please provide a friendly name for this blind.

calibration_close.title: Step 1: Close the blind
calibration_close.description: First, ensure {device_name} is fully closed (all the way down). Press 'Next' when ready.

calibration_open_instruction.title: Step 2: Open the blind
calibration_open_instruction.description: Now we will measure how long it takes to open {device_name}. Press Start **then** press the open button on the control to start measuring. There is no need to rush, the timer does not start until we receive a moving up message from the blinds.

calibration_close_instruction.title: Step 3: Close the blind
calibration_close_instruction.description: Now we will measure how long it takes to close {device_name}. Press Start **then** press the close button on the control to start measuring. There is no need to rush, the timer does not start until we receive a moving down message from the blinds.

calibration_complete.title: Calibration complete
calibration_complete.description:
Calibration for {device_name} complete!

Measured times:
- Open time: {open_time} seconds
- Close time: {close_time} seconds

These times will be used to accurately track the blind position.

error.pairing_timeout: No device responded within 2 minutes. Please try again and ensure you press the pairing button on your blind motor.
error.calibration_timeout: Calibration timed out. The blind took more than 5 minutes to complete the movement. Please check the device and try again.
error.calibration_start_timeout: Timeout waiting for the blind to start moving. Please ensure the device is properly connected and try again.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred during calibration. Please try again.

abort.pairing_timeout: No device responded within 2 minutes. Please try again.

user.title: Bind to blind
user.description: Select which blind this window sensor belongs to.

confirm.title: Confirm window sensor
confirm.description: Found window sensor **{device_id}** bound to blind **{blind_id}**.

abort.window_sensor_timeout: No window sensor signal was received within 60 seconds.
abort.no_blinds: No blinds are paired yet. Please pair a blind first.

init.title: Schellenberg USB
init.description: Edit the serial port path for the Schellenberg USB hub.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the serial port
error.invalid_group_id: Group ID must be a two-character hex value or a decimal channel number.
error.remote_learning_timeout: No remote button press was received before the timeout.

pair.name: Pair device
pair.description: Activate pairing mode on the Schellenberg USB stick to pair a new blind motor. After calling this service, press the pairing button on your blind motor within 10 seconds.

send_native_group_command.name: Send native group command
send_native_group_command.description: Send a Schellenberg native group command through the USB stick so all receivers on the selected group/channel react at the same time.

group_id.name: Group ID
group_id.description: Two-character Schellenberg group/channel byte. Use 05 for the fifth/all channel used by 5-channel remotes.
